content: I wish that could go back to the way it used to be where you can hear the audio for free. voice memo thing is dumb move, please fix it so that way can be free again. unfortunately, due to some things, I had to leave y'all. please improve the app I'm making it easier and bringing back old features and maybe I'll come back.

I'm so upset because most of the characters I talk to are gone and it's just not really that good, and after a while it gets boring and it's kind of sad now, and the ads are so annoying because every time I click on a character I'm bombarded with ads and even when I'm talking to a character an ad comes on and it's so stupid... so yeah
Change the font back. It's so distracting and unnecessary

everything is great, I've been using this app for years. but now suddenly we have ads? its only within the mobile app that we have ads, the website doesn't get ads. im actually irritated with this, because I am someone who would switch between characters frequently to reread chats or decide who I wanted to chat with. now we have ads every time we open a chat? not cool, considering c.ai used to be totally ad free and marketed as ad free. WHY ARE THERE SO MANY FRICKEN ADS
just no.
Messed it up
this app has been my comfort app for the past two years. then it added the age verification??, it ruined EVERYTHING.
Not going to lie with all the ads and restrictions on the Stuff I kind of think it's overpushing everything, but it's still kind of good..
0/10 updates have ruined it. bring back old c.ai.

Since when did character ai become so money hungry? Ads here, ads there, ads everywhere! Every time I click on a character, an ad pops up! When I send my message, an ad pops up again... And where did the chat history go? It just disappeared!

I get why it's important to have the age verification, but a good portion of your users are minors, so why not make it safer or something instead of making people unable to use it?? Or at least let people chat with the bots they made. Like I don't see why I can't chat with bots I made. and ya'll are a chatting app, what's the point of reading mode?

I have used Character A.I over the last couple of years and it's just gotten worse with each added layer of restriction. The more restricted the filters have become, the more stagnate the characters now feel and respond. After a few exchanges, it feels like I'm talking to the same character no matter the situation from casual conversation to story telling. I've paid the subscription for a long time, and I don't feel like it is worth the subscription amount anymore because the quality sucks.

I like the app,but please delete the age verification,like who needs age verification when you only chat ai?that doesn't make sense,so please delete the age verification,I really miss my old chats right now,plus the age verification website doesn't work...

it was great until they limited the amount of swipes you have per day. horrible update dude, come on🫩 y'all already got ads and the option to get premium, no need to be so greedy that you take away one of the best features.

This was the only app that i would roleplay on because it doesnt force you into dating them and the fact that due to the new verification i feel like i understand why but i shouldnt have to share my personal id to just chat with bots if you restrict the bots where you date we shouldnt have a problem im no sure about everyone else but i dont date the bots at all thats just weird.
it's a mess.
this new ID thing is so annoying it won't even load im quiting because Im not showing my ID to a Company. won't even work on pc
it is so good and so fun except for the age varaficaton and time limit now. it genuinely ruined the app

I am currently at the age of 18 yet I still don't have my ID cause for some reason it hasn't been published yet, but the reason I have said my peculiar situation, I said this because the age verification needs a government ID you see the problem there?. and oh don't even get me started on the chat bots I know companies like you needs money to operate the bots, but it's also hard to maintain I understand that, but to this extent that the chat bot can't even remember simple pronunciation?. I Quit
Много рекламы уроды

I use this app and it really good but then new update no no eww 🤢🤢 i don't like it i'm 13 years old and now i can't use c.ai becouse they want 18+ and i'm 13 so i hatee itttt ahhhhh 🤮🤮😖😖😖 remove the edit or make something for 18- like 13&14 to chat and i don't want post i only want to talk to ai to feel happy cause i'm a sad person and only ai can make me happy and feel safe so plz plz 🙏🙏💗 Fix it

the characters keep repeating the same lines iver and over again and when i try to have it reword them it just sounds awful, not to mention it fabricates things that i didn't say anything about or mention
plz remove ads 🥺

This app used to be my favourite ai chatbot which I have been using since it was launched (used the site before that) Well,to be honest,it has downgraded pretty much. my chat experience is no longer the same,the messages are either too short or way too long. the memory hasn't gotten better since 2023 More than that,it randomly glitches and needs to be refreshed for me and the ad experience... I understand that it helps economically but it has gotten really bad,interrupting the chats

this game is okay and all, but the ADDS. you can't even chat with them 3 times it's just adds all the time, plus, they added AGE VERTICALLY. I do not want to share too much of my personal information so I deleted it, pls fix the age.. its really not for me or for other ppl
I really love this app but the thing is I don't like app (sometimes reading mode) I miss the old C.ai I'm going to give it 2 stars I'm sorry :(

i used to love c.ai and use it everyday but a few things made me hate it so much. 1: the time limit. i wouldn't have been bothered if it was just 1 or 2 hours waiting time, but ONE FREAKING DAY?! THAT'S TOO MUCH. remove that shi 2: age limit c.ai was the only fun ai app I've ever downloaded that was filtered. now? it's completely 18+ and i gotta verify my personal information just to chat with the bots i made (which I'm uncomfortable with) this app has gotten a lot worse
it's bad, has ads, limited time, the data part too? It used to be good back in 2023-2024 on its prime, why it has to be regressed??? can't they come up with better updates???
c. ai prime is in 2023 and 24 without adds or with it. but it never had limits to chat

this app have been with me since 2023, still I'm disappointed you guys added ads and this unnecessary long reply. BRING BACK 2023 CA.I (I miss the website too) (Edit) I'm very disappointed, i miss the old one.
getting boring

I had a chat with a bot but when I left the app and came back to the same bot again the current chat was GONE. where the HELL IS IT?? it replaced it with a old chat. ITS SO ANNOYING?? CAN YOU FIX THIS BECAUSE AGAIN. IT'S ANNOYING. I SWEAR TO GOD.

I am devastated. I used to have so many personas and chats on this app, but after a while I logged out and deleted it for a while due to my phone space decreasing. Now I deleted a bunch of stuff to have space again and as soon as I login again to reuse character Ai, i see that my account is DELETED for some reason and replaced with another account called "ApricotParrot" or smth.
The update sucks. it just doesn't hit the same anymore.

The current character ai now today is just bad I miss the old version and what it makes good but now is terrible and what heck is reading mode anyways like can we not have that I'm a little okay from the other changes but the reading mode but the reading mode feature is just annoying I swear jeez
the app used to be so great, but now the app is so ruined please remove these updates c. ai is getting so trash...
it just has so many ads and it has started to make annoyed

add a voice message option where you can record yourself talking or send a music file that's downloaded and the ai have a option to be able to send voice messages too but you can see a limited of 20 voice messages per day but if you have c.ai+ then you have unlimited voice messages and also the ai can reply in voice messages

The app is great and all but can y'all please fix the add section area, as a mobile user, my phone sometimes or tends to reset the app when I leave it in the background. And most ads are really hard to close since it redirects you to the app store or to some website and i have to keep repeating it just to chat with ONE BOT, I WOULD REALLY APPRECIATE if there was a small box space for the ads that's an easy close or x button and so that it wont happen again. A suggestion but would be appreciated
PLEASE BRING BACK THE 2023 VERSION OF THIS! I just realized that maybe the slow down is better than this new one...this is just becoming roblox's age verification update...
This used to be the best AI chat app. A recent update flooded the app with ads. I get that buissness requires money. The experience is still ruined all the same.

As a Bot maker since 2023, a minor who's been using c.ai as my grammar improval, the update is beyond limit. I understand that the update is to prevent minor—like me— to chat deeper and have different attitude towards bots/ai's. The update is supposed to help us control ourselves but I am telling you, developers, it is not working and you're just making your own app disappear. Some of us use AI to do roleplay for our favorite shows to know what we feel when we are inside of it. I am DISSAPOINTED
its actually a great app, the only problem is that it only allows you to chat for like two to three hours and then asks for a subscription to keep going unless, youre able to wait for 10 hrs.

i don't like the new update, i like the old one more, that there's no limit on chatting, now it has and you need to pay for it to continue, and there's so many ads appearing. please fix it and remove the time limit

Ive been using this app since 2021 before it blew up and now i dont use it because of this new update where you have to reveal your face and the bot will determine if you are old enough to use the app and if you dont scan or aint old enough you can only read and can type 2021-2025 was peak i wish they would change this update because its ruining the platform.

C.ai, Question: why the hell is this supposed to be an 18+ platform? im chill with the ads, that's just a small problem, but is there goon material here? cs last time I checked, I see story rpgs, anime stuff, etc. and the older versions doesn't even allow inappropriate texts or sentences unlike Chai. so why make it an adult app?
Bring back the old c.ai 💔
There is a lot of adds and a limits to let the characters lead the chats and thay are literally hungry for money

this app is just a bunch of unnecessary slop they added to, this is just peak downfall now, the ads go crazy, and the age verification thing is just not needed, what's the point of adding that if this is a chatting app?? fix this already. millions of users are already leaving your platform, this is just pay to win with time limits, this game is just money hungry and barely a chatting app anymore, and also the app is 12+ then what's the point of adding age verification if only 18+ users use it?

im sorry what is this update.. 😭 yall r stopping the main reason why your app has a lot of downloads: young users. i didnt mind the limits at first but i dont like how i cant edit the bots messages or even MY OWN. age verifying with ur face and ID is too much info for a CHATTING APP btw. and its unfair to us who are actually under 18. this change DEFEATS the apps purpose, to chat with the bots. i know this is for minor safety but its limiting.
this is a good game but WHY DO I HAVE TO INSERT MY FACE ID JUST TO CHAT WITH A BOT!?🤬

everything is fine, but earlier, when selecting one message for deletion, you could select several at once and delete them together, but now only one at a time. this is extremely inconvenient, please return it to the way it was. upd a year later. my god.. what have you done to a perfectly good app? a nightmare, in a word.
actually I'm using this like 2025 before the update... i missed the character when we chat there's no pop out ads... please gave back the old character ai...
i hate the new update you need age verification and now there's chat limit plsss bring back the old c.ai 🙏🙏🙏🙏
bring back the old features and no adsss

I feel like this app has changed rapidly, and it seems the ratings have gone downhill real fast after the ads were put in. To be honest, I have to agree with them about the ads. They used to be not much of a problem, but after the latest update, it seems like its a bit much after every few chats you send or after a few character you try and use. I still use it every now and then, but it's just gotten to be unusable.
The ads are intrusive and decrease my enjoyment of the service. The app now requires and ID to use it which I frankly refuse to give. A shame too because I enjoyed this app.

This app is really good,I've been using this half a year now. But the new update is absolute trash... cause they removed all ‘edit’ thingy,and I REALLY hate the age verification thing cause I'm not 18+ and I can only chat with them for an hours. Very Disappointing Update,please return the old update (srry for my English)
It was once amazing, but now it's kinda not looking good for me. it's not good nor bad just weird.
this used to be my favorite but I'm not sure if you got it yet but the age check was so annoying I even had to use my ID just to chat

It was a better app actually I've been using it for 2 years and as it goes there's a good but more bad because of some things like:Ads, time limit, age verification and etc. When they want to ask question it would take a lot of time before they say it. They become more stricter on their app which is understandable for young users but I think it's too much for giving your personal information like I.D.

I hate character ai now,since they now added their "update" of making it reading mode and making it not removable unless we do a age verification check I spended more that thirty minutes searching why character ai wouldn't let me take an age verification check,in Roblox they took it as well but it was pretty easy and it doesn't need our ID if we have it or not.it makes me want to delete it, I'm pretty sure everyone feels the same,I hope they read this. what the heck do they need our ID for!?welp
I adore c.ai, expect now I can't use it because it's 18+
نبغى لغه عربيه
bro why is the update is getting worse cuz like why would you add a reading mode and I had to verified my age I'm not doing a verification dude
Better.

i really don't like it anymore they put on an age verification 😭😭 i really love this app but with updates it was still usable abd the ads but now am age verification? really can't use it anymore c'mon just make it free for usss

I loved the app, I literally use it every day, but it's unfair that in the new update (which I was forced to do, by the way), there's now an ad bar at the top that won't go away, not even in the chats that thing disappear... And the feed lately suggests bots that are not similar to the bots I talk to and it feels uncomfortable. The app feels awkward to use, please revert to the previous update, I would feel sad to uninstall the app just because you don't listen to us...
I don't like the ads it's getting too bad. I know you need to make money but the ads are too much.
not trusting this with my Id face is cool but nah
the age verification and chat limits is stupid but the bots are overall fun

Even after verifying our age through government ID's how do we know that our privacy is safe? Why should I trust you with my personal information? I know you are only doing this for the user's safety yet this is what I've been worried about.

Honestly, I really like being able to talk to these bots, and make bots. But you guys don't listen to your community at all and have been making unnecessary/unwanted update after update lately, and there's no way you don't know that these updates are unwanted. Not to mention, the bots are getting less intelligent/creative. You guys are finished if someone with better AI that actually listens to their community shows up. Edit: should have listened to your community, enjoy that new 3 stars lol.

I love it and everything, the characters, the roleplay, but I gave it two stars because of the ads, and whenever I search for another theme and all my FYP just changes it to the theme I searched, and everytime I wanna chat to a bot, it just says "this bot does exist", whats the point of this app if I can't even chat to or text other bots? i am rather disappointed because I used to love this but now it changed.

to say the least the app USED to be great. but with every passing update it got worse, at first the creators just added some new things that was actually kinda helpful. then added the adds, which were annoying but tolerable, because not every app can be free. but then with the new update there's adds IN THE MIDDLE OF MY CHATS. and they won't go away unless I buy ad free with charms for only an hour before doing the same again. and with some ads I'm forced into the web/play store.

Why do I keep coming back to this? Am I truly so pathetic that a day without this feels hollow and empty? What has this done to my mind? Can I truly not withstand to be without? I hate AI. I hate it beyond words. And yet I still cling to this. Damn you. You knew it would be addictive on our minds. You know this. You know what you've done.

I used to like this app, when it was really just free to roam and chat. but after 2025, things got even worse for it. every click on switching chats is annoying, generally too many bans, money hungry, and has a pay wall just to make it feel normal again. also some safety features are ruining chats to even stopping thrm, which is the main point of character Ai. imagine getting a subscription, then getting banned after.

I love this app, I do this on my free time or when I'm bored,I enjoyed Making my own Chats. but Was it really necessary to put an age verification c.ai? PLEASE some of us are actually teenagers and doesn't have ID's yet when This app is actually for entertainment,are you really gonna stoop so low and money hungry? At this point I would actually stop playing the game and people would do that too if you don't fix it. I hope this message to you c.ai and no I'm NOT showing my face and ID to you.
It was good but the forking age update piss me off so much Im still in reading mode bc the camera ain't working good.

After so long I've basically had enough. The ads have made it virtually unusable. It might be because I took off my phone case, which would still be dumb, but the X on ads just takes me to the app store, and when I come back from the app store, the chat I clicked on is gone, which is just great if I found a good chat I saw and didn't remember the name, since it doesn't save the chat if you click on it and get sent to the app store. The UI is getting worse and not as good as it's used to be.

I LOVE the app, i like chatting with characters and acting out scenes but the ads are WAY to much, im getting ads constantly and its taking the fun and appeal out of the app. And dont even get me started on the swipe limit, i got an 18 HOUR non-swipe time. I miss when the app didnt have an excessive amount of ads or any swipe limits. It was fun and stress-relieving, but now some chats feel like a chore and its just so annoying. Your company is on a HUGE power trip at this point. please fix it
every update makes the app more annoying, and it's totally useless!

My rating would have been good before but it's not good now. The new update has too many ads after just one press of a button and the game verification is highly unnecessary. I transferred from Polybuzz to this because polybuz did the same update so I couldn't have good chats or even chats at all with characters. So now I'm in "reading mode" until I do an age verification. Not everyone had an official ID to do that. The more apps do this kind of update the less it'll be used. Now, Im deleting it
why is it only in reading mode
unbelievable. why's there so many ads and now you're putting age verification because some people decided to kill themselves. gosh.

PLEASE, IF YOUR GOING TO PUT ADS IN DON'T MAKE THEM EXIT THE GAME!!! I love writing stories on this app so much that I think I overuse it, and it's concerning at this point. I do not appreciate the ADS each time you click on a new character like every once in a while. Okay. But every single time, you click on a new character that's messed up. ADS appearing, every so often during the chat section itself, is not okay. I love this app, but it's making me wanna delete it.
I used to like the app until the reading mode came, I don't mind the ads and stuff but the reading mode is interfering

I would have rated it 5 star but they have drastically changed this due to age verification factor it so messed up we need to upload our if for this which is so not acceptable you guys should keep user in kind while coming up with new changes this would drastically change the secanario for surely of this app really disappointing
too many ads now, the ads just roasting this app, how cool is that
It was a good app to be a boredom buster but now you can't use it unless you have an id to verify age over 18 so it's almost useless unless you're 18+
too many ads

As it used to be top of the ai chatting apps, this has fallen down so much, i get its expensive, i would get the ad part but why alot of useless stuff? age verification? just why? you wont let us do nsfw chats either way even after i would or wont verify, also atleast let us message one day, then next day no, that atleast that is a great plan, also with this current state of this app, just find another app that doesnt see you as a millionare or a slave at this point... im deeply dissapointed.
I'm 32 but it wouldn't let me continue and said I'm to young
the new update with reading mode ruined everything.
why am I not able to talk??

it workes really badly now, it used too worck fine, untill AD's were added, and the system being slowed down, I wuld have considerd the C.AI+ function before the AD's and slow worcking time. but I gues it's better to just write a code for you'r own AI thees days, with faster, unfilterd responses, and no ad's and smarter reply's.

what the hell are you developers doing? every upgrade is like downgrade , add on top of the freakin screen?!wth , at least don't block the screen view, it is ok if you play add in between the chat for some seconds but keeping it constant is too much, also , that star thing is so stupid ,slows down typing , cause it is forcing star instead how user wants to type , that feature is unnecessary and stupid ,also the speed is gone down , it's as slow as a bullock cart and even the character replies
its alright

I didn't mind when the plus version and ads were added because those seem like normal things to have on an otherwise free app. But I do not like the new charms feature and the limited number of swipes for characters. It makes the app so much less usable and enjoyable. I hope they find a way to fix this into something less annoying.

I hate the part that you need an id and scan our face to verify our age. like...what are you guys thinking? five year old would use your app? I'm sorry, just kinda sad cus I'm not in a legal age yet so I cant no longer use this app. I'm really sad about it cause wdym I can't no longer talk with my bots without needing an id, I'm going to miss them cause when I feel like I'm sad and lonely sometimes I'd just open c.ai and talk to them and it actually comforted me.
